hero.title: Professional renovation & construction for your
hero.subtitle: High-quality carpentry, bathroom remodeling, tiling, painting, and roofing in Halland and Skåne regions. We bring your ideas to life with precision.

about.title: Quality & reliability
about.quote: “Our goal is to build practical, durable, and beautiful spaces that you and your family will enjoy for many years to come.”
about.text1: Hi, I am Andrey. I am an experienced carpenter and builder. Over the last 10 years, I have been working on home renovation, assembly, and restoration in Sweden. My focus is on absolute precision, material knowledge, and delivering high-quality results.
about.text2: I cover the Halland and Skåne regions, based in Knäred (Laholm municipality). We work closely with our clients in Laholm, Halmstad, Båstad, Ängelholm, and Markaryd, creating tailored solutions for their homes and budget.
about.text3: We perform the full range of construction and renovation works – from cost estimation and planning to turnkey projects of any complexity. We combine modern technologies and innovative methods with Scandinavian simplicity and a personalized approach to each project.

advantages.title: Why choose
advantages.expDesc: Deep knowledge of Swedish building codes and materials ensures long-lasting results.
advantages.indDesc: We plan every single project around your specific ideas, schedule, and budget.
advantages.atmDesc: We respect your home. We maintain a tidy workspace and clean up thoroughly after our work.

windows-doors.title: Window & door installation
windows-doors.desc: Professional installation and replacement of energy-efficient windows and entry doors for draft protection.
windows-doors.benefit: Perfectly sealed windows and doors that prevent drafts, lower your heating bills, and provide great soundproofing.
windows-doors.seo_desc: Professional replacement and installation of windows and doors in Laholm, Halmstad, and Båstad. Secure fit and neat finish. Get a free quote.
indications_list: Drafty, cold, or hard-to-close windows
High heating bills due to old single/double glass
Worn out exterior doors that need replacement
Facade renovations or new extensions
windows-doors.process_text: We start with precise measurements on-site. Next, we carefully remove the old frames to minimize wall damage. We level the new frame with millimeter precision, secure it, insulate with weatherproofing materials, and mount neat interior trim and exterior sills.
windows-doors.contraindications_text: Outdoor installation is not recommended in heavy rain, strong winds, or temperatures below -10°C due to expanding foam properties.

kitchen-assembly.title: Kitchen assembly & installation
kitchen-assembly.desc: Complete assembly of kitchen cabinets, countertops, sinks, and integrated appliances.
kitchen-assembly.benefit: A durable and perfectly aligned kitchen (e.g. IKEA). All cabinets are safely anchored to the wall, doors are adjusted, and countertops fit perfectly.
kitchen-assembly.seo_title: Kitchen Assembly in Halmstad, Laholm & Båstad
kitchen-assembly.seo_desc: Professional IKEA kitchen assembly and installation in Halmstad, Båstad, and Laholm. Seamless countertop cuts and cabinet alignment. Call us.
indications_list: Buying a new kitchen (IKEA, Marbodal, etc.)
Complete layout remodeling of your kitchen
Replacing old kitchen countertops and sinks
Integrating new kitchen appliances
kitchen-assembly.process_text: We check the walls and floor levels and prepare anchors. We assemble and install base and wall cabinets. We cut and install the countertop (including sink and hob cutouts), align doors, adjust drawers, and integrate appliances and lighting.
kitchen-assembly.contraindications_text: Water and electrical connections must be prepared or approved by certified VVS and electrical partners.

bathroom-renovation.title: Bathroom renovation
bathroom-renovation.desc: Renovation and installation of bathroom furniture, shower cabins, toilets, and wet room fuktsäkring.
bathroom-renovation.benefit: A modern, hygienic, and fuktsäkert bathroom. We ensure correct floor slope towards the drain and sturdy installation of all bathroom furniture.
bathroom-renovation.seo_desc: Bathroom remodeling and wet room preparation in Båstad, Halmstad, and Laholm. Professional tile and vanity installation according to regulations.
indications_list: Worn-out wet room surfaces, mold, or water leaks
Updating bathroom vanity, toilet, or shower screen
Installing new floor heating in the bathroom
Remodeling laundry room or guest toilet
bathroom-renovation.process_text: We demolish old surfaces if needed and level the floor for correct water drainage. We apply approved waterproofing membrane (tätskikt), install tiles and grout. Lastly, we mount the toilet, sink, faucets, shower glass, and cabinets.
bathroom-renovation.contraindications_text: Wet room works require strict drying times for plaster and membrane. Water must be shut off during short periods.

tiling.title: Wall & floor tiling
tiling.desc: Professional laying of ceramic, porcelain, or mosaic tiles in kitchens, bathrooms, hallways, and utility rooms.
tiling.benefit: Completely flat tile surfaces with symmetrical grout lines. Extremely durable and easy-to-clean walls and floors.
tiling.seo_title: Professional Tiler in Ängelholm, Båstad & Laholm
tiling.seo_desc: Looking for a tiler? We lay floor and wall tiles in Ängelholm, Båstad, Halmstad, and Laholm. Quality kitchen backsplashes and bathroom tiling.
indications_list: New kitchen backsplash tiling
Durable floor tiles in utility rooms, halls, or kitchens
Tiling bathroom walls and floor
Installing frost-resistant tiles in conservatories
tiling.process_text: We prime the surface for maximum adhesion. We measure the area to get symmetrical cuts on borders. We apply adhesive, lay the tiles using leveling systems to prevent fogsprång, grout the joints, and apply silicone sealant in corners.
tiling.contraindications_text: Tiled floors must not be walked on for at least 24 hours after installation while the adhesive cures.

painting.title: Painting & decorating
painting.desc: Plastering, sanding, interior wall and ceiling painting, wood trim coating, and exterior facade painting.
painting.benefit: Smooth walls without bubbles or cracks, sharp edges, and uniform paint color. We use durable, eco-friendly interior paints.
painting.seo_title: House Painter in Markaryd, Halmstad & Laholm | Painting
painting.seo_desc: Professional painting services, plastering, sanding, and facade painting in Markaryd, Halmstad, and Laholm. High-quality materials.
indications_list: Dirty, scratched, or faded walls and ceilings
New plasterboard walls requiring tape jointing and painting
Protecting wood siding facade of your house
Changing interior wall colors or wallpapering
painting.process_text: We protect floors, windows, and furniture. We plaster cracks and drywall seams, sand everything smooth, and apply primer. Next, we paint two coats of high-quality paint. Lastly, we remove masking tape and clean up.
painting.contraindications_text: Interior painting requires good ventilation and temperatures above +10°C. Facade painting requires dry weather without direct harsh sunlight.

roofing-woodwork.title: Roofing & exterior woodwork
roofing-woodwork.desc: Roof repair, shingle replacement, and building wooden decks, terraces, fences, and facades.
roofing-woodwork.benefit: A completely weather-tight roof protecting your home, and beautiful outdoor wooden decks built using premium pressure-treated lumber.
roofing-woodwork.seo_desc: We build wooden terraces, fences, and replace roofs in Laholm, Halmstad, Ängelholm. Professional carpentry services with warranty.
indications_list: Old or leaking roof shingles and underlayment
Desire to build a new wooden deck or terrace
Building garden fences, gates, or wind barriers
Replacing worn-out fascia boards or wood siding
roofing-woodwork.process_text: For roofs, we inspect sheathing, lay underlayment membrane, mount batten structures, and lay shingles or sheet metal. For terraces, we prepare concrete foundations, build a heavy-duty joist frame, screw down decking boards, and build railings.
roofing-woodwork.contraindications_text: Roofing and exterior woodworks are heavily dependent on weather conditions and are best done during dry seasons.

list.name: Johan Persson
list.text: Andrey Bygg installed new windows in our house and built a fantastic deck in the backyard. The work was done quickly, cleanly, and with incredible precision. Highly recommended!

list.name: Maria Andersson
list.text: We hired Andrey to assemble our new IKEA kitchen. Everything was put together perfectly and fitted against our uneven walls. Smooth communication and fair price.

list.name: Lars Lindqvist
list.text: Excellent tiling work in our bathroom. Andrey is very detail-oriented, keeps the workplace clean, and is always on time. I recommend him for any renovation projects.

footer.desc: Professional building and renovation services focusing on quality, durability, and neat finishing. Helping you build your dream home.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: June 24, 2026
privacy.intro: Andrey Bygg respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you visit our website or submit an inquiry through our forms.
privacy.section1_text: When you submit our contact or quote form, we collect the details you enter: name, email address, phone number, service of interest, and project description.
privacy.section2_text: We use your details exclusively to answer your request, calculate estimates, prepare quotes, and contact you regarding your construction project.
privacy.section3_text: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to outside parties. All data is kept strictly confidential within Andrey Bygg.
privacy.section4_text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access or alteration. Our website uses SSL encryption for secure data transfer.
privacy.seo_desc: Privacy Policy for Andrey Bygg. We protect your personal data and handle it according to Swedish legislation.

gallery.subtitle: Take a look at our completed construction, renovation, and carpentry projects. We guarantee high-quality craftsmanship in every detail.
